remarks: Cozy and Bright 1 bedroom Furnished/ Unfurnished condo at "Royal Pavilion," walking distance to lively downtown, shopping, Bus stop, theaters, park, and restaurants. Wood flooring throughout. Building amenities include: gym, sauna, laundry room, and 24-hour doorman. Rent includes all utilities, even electricity; 1 indoor garage parking space is included. No pets! Agents, please read agent remarks regarding application requirements and move-in requirements.
